---
title: "import"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# import

```{julia}
# import
include("./02_languages/06_moudles/99_TestModule.jl") # it is similar as copy the code in front.
import .AnimalKingdom # which only import the moudle instead of the exportings.
mycat = AnimalKingdom.Cat("FanTuan", 1.0)
mydog = Dog("Buddy", "Golden Retriever") # it is error.
import .AnimalKingdom: Dog
mydog = Dog("Buddy", "Golden Retriever")
```

```{julia}
# using
include("./02_languages/moudles/99_TestModule.jl") # it is similar as copy the code in front.
using .AnimalKingdom # which import the moudle and the exportings.
mydog = Dog("Buddy", "Golden Retriever")
```
